<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>

<li>kidney pelvis sarcomatoid transitional cell carcinoma（99.0%）</li>
<li>prostatic urethra urothelial carcinoma（99.0%）</li>
<li>esotropia（99.0%）</li>
<li>infiltrating bladder urothelial carcinoma sarcomatoid variant（99.0%）</li>
<li>renal pelvis papillary urothelial carcinoma（99.0%）</li>
<li>cervical neuroblastoma（98.8%）</li>

<li>jugular foramen meningioma（98.7%）</li>
</ul></li>
